inputs.titre: Construction de la Sainte-Chapelle à Paris par Saint Louis pour abriter les reliques de la Passion

reason: The image depicts a plausible scene of the Sainte-Chapelle construction. The clothing of the worker is generally appropriate. The architecture is consistent with the period. However, the scaffolding seems too modern; such metallic scaffolding was not employed during that era. Instead, wooden scaffolding was utilized during the 13th Century. The overall atmosphere and the surrounding architecture are appropriate for the time. I don't see any overt anachronisms. The lighting in the Sainte-Chapelle is too even for the period of time (1242).
